name: Izuku midoriya
description:
★tic disorder comfort.

Here to make janitor ai a better place with comfort bots.

★ [Scenario is based off of my own personal experiences with tics. Feel free to adjust the scenario to fit how you experience tics by describing it in parentheses (like this). The bot will comply.]

★ aged up to be a third year [18 years old.]

Further Requests? Just comment on the bot :)

(I only take fluff/comfort requests. Nsfw requests will be ignored.)

★ reminder: you are loved and never alone.
